title: Interruption applicable to all minerals
doc_html:
§92.  Interruption applicable to all minerals

An interruption of prescription applies to all types of minerals covered by the act creating the mineral royalty.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §92, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
